fields.name: maxNumberOfConnections
fields.description: The maximal number of connections for each itinerary. Value can be 0, 1 or 2.

fields.name: nonStopPreferred
fields.description: When this option is requested, recommendations made of Non-Stop flights only are favoured by the search, on the whole itinerary, with a weight of 75%. It is possible to override this default 75% weight of Non-Stop recommendations by providing the requested weight in the attribute nonStopPreferredWeight

fields.name: nonStopPreferredWeight
fields.description: This weight is the percentage of total number of recommendations that could be returned for Non-Stop flight recommendations. It is only relevant when combined with nonSTopPreferred set to true. If not specified, the default weight of 75% is applied

fields.name: airportChangeAllowed
fields.description: Allow to change airport during connection

fields.name: technicalStopsAllowed
fields.description: This option allows the single segment to have one or more intermediate stops (technical stops).
